stimulus: In praising Joy Harjo's collection An American Sunrise, a critic observed that the works of the former US Poet Laureate retain their ______blank character when read silently: the lines carry the same rhythmic, song-like cadence on the page that they do when Harjo recites them aloud.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice D is the best answer because the text describes the lines as having a "rhythmic, song-like cadence," which "musical" captures directly. Choice A is incorrect because "technical" suggests specialized or procedural, not song-like. Choice B is incorrect because "private" suggests intimate or personal, not the rhythmic quality the text emphasizes. Choice C is incorrect because "discordant" means clashing, the opposite of the harmonious cadence described.
